r-focus-kill|assets/css/pages/ask.css|/*.reason: Container-level indicator: .ask-field:focus-within draws the ring on the composer wrapper (ask.css:193), so the inner textarea suppresses its own — keyboard focus stays visible. Sanctioned 2026-07-02 (3.9e).

r-focus-kill|assets/css/pages/property.c.reason: Double-ring dedup: the global *:focus-visible box-shadow (base.css:90, lower specificity, not overridden here) still renders on the gallery group — this rule only drops the redundant second outline on a large block. Sanctioned 2026-07-02 (3.9e).

r-no-style-assign|assets/js/dashboard/ti.reason: Deposit-arc SVG animation: strokeDashoffset is a numeric SVG presentation value driven per-frame; a CSS-var indirection adds no safety. Sanctioned 2026-07-01 (v1 baseline port).

r-no-style-assign|assets/js/page-area-de.reason: Cross-document View Transition: view-transition-name must be set programmatically on the morphing element (area title). Sanctioned 2026-07-01 (v1 baseline port).

r-no-style-assign|assets/js/page-areas.j.reason: Cross-document View Transition: list-side counterpart of the area-title morph. Sanctioned 2026-07-01 (v1 baseline port).
